name: 50+ Official Pokemon Cards Collection with 5 Foils in Any Combination and at Least 1 Rarity, GX, EX, FA, Tag Team, Or Secret Rare
bullets: 1 GX, EX, V, VMax, Full Art, Tag Team, or Secret Rare
description: This Pokemon collection contains more than 50 Pokemon cards. A minimum of 5 of the cards will be Holo and at least 1 GX, EX, Full Art, Tag Team, V, VMax or Secret Rare. This collection is for Pokémon cards only. The pictures are examples of the type of cards you could receive. No specific card is guaranteed.

reviews.name: Aleia
reviews.title: Longtime Collector's Honest Review
reviews.body: I'm a collector of over 20 years that's restarting after having given my collection to my kid- so I've been around long enough to know a good deal when I have one. True, you get the guaranteed larger card and the holos, not really any other "big big" cards, but for someone who's a genuine collector, this is great. I bought three of these with two Chaos Rising booster bundles and opened them all…

reviews.name: SweeneyTodd
reviews.title: Nostalgic
reviews.body: Enjoyed these a lot. New-condition, good variety, very nostalgic looking through them with my daughter, a nice starter pack to rebuild the "original" cards from years ago. Had a few repeats, but since my daughter and I were sharing them, it wasn't an issue, we each got one of the repeats.

reviews.name: Jake Iacono
reviews.title: Great variety, Great Value, Almost all creature cards
reviews.body: Perfect for the kids or casual collectors. Came with 50 pack new condition Pokemon cards. It was a wide variety of Pokemon from every era and type, with 5 foils/reflector cards. The kids loved it and the best part was there were only 2 energy cards and 1 Trainor. Would give 6 stars if I could. Will be buying more.

reviews.name: Dr. Black
reviews.title: Good cards. Bought mutiple times. EX was right on top, whoopee!
reviews.body: Good cards. Bought 3 times. Got only 50 this time, the other times 51 and 52, haha.For this set there was one EX right on the top. Had a bunch of foils also.As mentioned, great cards. There were a few duplicates, one character different versions... and 2 of the same card. Nothing crazy.Can recommend...enjoy!
